# This file is generated by the flutter tool. Do not edit manually.
# It will be regenerated by "flutter pub get".
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)

set(EPHEMERAL_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/ephemeral")

include(${EPHEMERAL_DIR}/generated_config.cmake)

include(${EPHEMERAL_DIR}/generated_plugins.cmake OPTIONAL)

add_library(flutter INTERFACE)
target_include_directories(flutter INTERFACE
  "${EPHEMERAL_DIR}"
)
target_link_libraries(flutter INTERFACE
  "${FLUTTER_LIBRARY}"
)
add_custom_target(flutter_assemble DEPENDS flutter_engine_stamp)
